name: Romesh Ranganathan
bio: Romesh Ranganathan is a British comedian, actor and presenter from Crawley known for deadpan, self-deprecating stand-up. A former mathematics teacher of Sri Lankan Tamil heritage, he was nominated for Best Newcomer at the 2013 Edinburgh Comedy Awards and went on to arena tours and a Netflix special. He has presented travel and panel programmes and hosts the revived Weakest Link.

timeline.ev: Nominated for Best Newcomer at the Edinburgh Comedy Awards
Completes his first major tour, Irrational Live
Publishes the memoir Straight Outta Crawley
Wins the BAFTA TV Award for Best Features for The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
Begins hosting the revival of The Weakest Link
Releases The Cynics Mixtape special on Netflix

accolades: BAFTA TV Award for Best Features (2020)
BAFTA TV Award for Best Entertainment Performance (2021)
Sell-out arena tours including fourteen nights at the Eventim Apollo
